nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chlorophoneus
nodes.summary: Chlorophoneus（Chlorophoneus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Bocage's bushshrike、Orange-breasted bushshrike、Olive bushshrike等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bocage's bushshrike
nodes.summary: Bocage's bushshrike (Chlorophoneus bocagei), also known as the grey-green bushshrike, is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is scatteredly present throughout central Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References External links photo at World Bird Gallery
